title: Epoxy Flooring for Grocery and Convenience Stores - Elite South Texas
content:
Grocery & Convenience Stores
Grocery and convenience stores require durable flooring for heavy foot traffic while maintaining an aesthetic appeal. Our flooring systems offer a variety of options to meet the individual needs of your facility while being FDA, USDA and CFIA acceptable. They are slip resistant, antimicrobial and are easy to clean and maintain.
Advantages
FDA, USDA and CFIA acceptable
Antimicrobial and antibacterial
Options that withstand forced steam cleaning
Engineered for heavy traffic including shopping carts, pallet jacks and other equipment
Suitable for extreme hot and cold environments
Slip resistance with adjustable coefficient of friction ranges
Stain resistant to acids, oils, juices, petrochemicals, cleaning chemicals, etc.
Much more durable and equally as cost effective as commonly used VCT
Contact for more information
Public shopping spaces
Commercial kitchens, delis and butcheries
Freezers and cold storage
Warehouses and food storage
Loading docks
Packaging and processing facilities
Contact for more information
